title: M4-03b: Add preview expiration and integrate with approval flow
acceptance_criteria: Preview expires after 5 minutes of inactivity
Warning shown at 4 minutes: 'Preview expires in 1 minute'
After expiration, modal closes with message: 'Preview expired'
On approve: sends /approve command via WebSocket
On reject: sends /reject command via WebSocket
Updates pending approval state in session
deliverables: Modified: WebSocketProvider to integrate preview modal with approval flow
